subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved of God! His honour Rustam-Dastán hath loosed his tongue in praise of you, that the friends in Yazd [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای الهی جناب رستم دستان لسان بستایش شما گشود که احبای یزد آن
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @consolation and comfort
